mapper.sql: id, task_id, subtask_def_id, name, priority, status, compensation, allow_manual, created_at, updated_at, warehouse_id, current_instruction_index, completed_at, remark, selected_device_id, activity_instance_id, area, workflow_def_id, free_device_id, check_aisle

choose.when:
INSERT INTO subtasks (task_id, subtask_def_id, name, priority, status, warehouse_id, compensation, allow_manual, workflow_def_id, area, selected_device_id, current_instruction_index, is_start_next_process, free_device_id, created_at, updated_at, check_aisle) OUTPUT INSERTED.id values
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.subtaskDefId}, #{item.name}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.compensation}, #{item.allowManual}, #{item.workflowDefId}, #{item.area}, #{item.selectedDeviceId}, #{item.currentInstructionIndex}, #{item.isStartNextProcess}, #{item.freeDeviceId}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.checkAisle})

INSERT INTO subtasks (task_id, subtask_def_id, name, priority, status, warehouse_id, compensation, allow_manual, workflow_def_id, area, selected_device_id, current_instruction_index, is_start_next_process, free_device_id, created_at, updated_at, check_aisle) values
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.subtaskDefId}, #{item.name}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.compensation}, #{item.allowManual}, #{item.workflowDefId}, #{item.area}, #{item.selectedDeviceId}, #{item.currentInstructionIndex}, #{item.isStartNextProcess}, #{item.freeDeviceId}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.checkAisle})
RETURNING id
UPDATE subtasks SET status = #{status} WHERE id IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(#{subtaskIds}, ','))
UPDATE subtasks SET status = #{status} WHERE id = ANY (string_to_array(#{subtaskIds}, ',')::int[])
SELECT TOP (#{limit}) * FROM subtasks WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM subtasks WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

-- 两段式 upsert，使用键范围锁，避免 MERGE 锁竞争 UPDATE subtasks WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) SET updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND subtask_def_id = #{subtaskDefId} IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0 BEGIN INSERT INTO subtasks (task_id, subtask_def_id, name, priority, status, warehouse_id, workflow_def_id, area, current_instruction_index, activity_instance_id, selected_device_id, is_start_next_process, free_device_id, created_at, updated_at, check_aisle) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{subtaskDefId}, #{name}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{warehouseId}, #{workflowDefId}, #{area}, #{currentInstructionIndex}, #{activityInstanceId}, #{selectedDeviceId}, #{isStartNextProcess}, #{freeDeviceId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{checkAisle}) END SELECT FROM subtasks WITH (HOLDLOCK) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND subtask_def_id = #{subtaskDefId}

WITH upsert AS ( -- 尝试更新已有记录 UPDATE subtasks SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND subtask_def_id = #{subtaskDefId} RETURNING ), ins AS ( -- 如果不存在，插入新记录 INSERT INTO subtasks (task_id, subtask_def_id, name, priority, status, warehouse_id, created_at, updated_at, workflow_def_id, area, current_instruction_index, activity_instance_id, selected_device_id, is_start_next_process, free_device_id, check_aisle) SELECT #{taskId}, #{subtaskDefId}, #{name}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{warehouseId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{workflowDefId}, #{area}, #{currentInstructionIndex}, #{activityInstanceId}, #{selectedDeviceId}, #{isStartNextProcess}, #{freeDeviceId}, #{checkAisle} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM subtasks WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND subtask_def_id = #{subtaskDefId} ) RETURNING ) SELECT * FROM upsert UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ins

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM subtasks WHERE id = #{id} AND warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId}

choose.when:
select
FROM subtasks where task_id = #{taskId} and warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and status != 'completed' order by id asc LIMIT 1
